declarations.description: An editor plugin for GOOSE and SMV subscriber data binding.
declarations.name: OscdEditorSubscriberDatabinding

members.name: scopedElements
members.default: { 'oscd-icon': OscdIcon, 'oscd-outlined-segmented-button': OscdOutlinedSegmentedButton, 'oscd-outlined-segmented-button-set': OscdOutlinedSegmentedButtonSet, 'fcda-binding-list': FcdaBindingList, 'extref-ln-binding-list': ExtRefLnBindingList, 'oscd-scl-dialogs': OscdSclDialogs, }

declarations.name: getAssociatedDataSet
declarations.description:
Returns the DataSet referenced by a control block's `datSet` attribute.
The DataSet must be a sibling under the same LN0.

declarations.name: getAssociatedCommunication
declarations.description:
Returns the communication element associated with a control block.
The element is located in Communication > SubNetwork > ConnectedAP and matched
by iedName, apName, ldInst, and cbName.

declarations.name: getAssociatedSmvOpts
declarations.description: Returns the SmvOpts child element when editing a SampledValueControl.

declarations.name: isDataSetSingleUse
declarations.description:
Returns true if no other control block under the same LN0 references
the given DataSet. A single-use DataSet can be safely removed together
with its control block.

declarations.name: buildRemoveEdits
declarations.description:
Builds an EditV2 array that removes a control block and its associated
elements: the DataSet (if single-use) and its communication element.

A slot-based filterable list. Renders a search input above an `<oscd-list>`
and hides slotted items whose text content does not match the search query.

Items can provide searchable text via their `data-value` attribute or via
their `textContent`. Items without either are always shown.
declarations.name: FilteredList

declarations.description:
Edition 2 and later SCL files allow to restrict subscription on
later binding type inputs (`ExtRef` elements) based on a `CDC` and
basic type `bType`.

parameters.name: leftElement

parameters.description: The name of the attribute to check.

declarations.description: Simple function to check if the attribute of the Left Side has the same value as the attribute of the Right Element.

parameters.name: leftElement

parameters.description: The name of the attribute (left) to check against.

parameters.name: rightAttributeName

declarations.description: Simple function to check if the attribute of the Left Side has the same value as the attribute of the Right Element.

parameters.name: controlTag
parameters.description: Indicates which type of control element.

parameters.name: controlElement
parameters.description: The Control Element to check against.

parameters.name: fcdaElement
parameters.description: The FCDA Element to check against.

parameters.name: extRefElement
parameters.description: The Ext Ref Element to check.

declarations.description:
Check if specific attributes from the ExtRef Element are the same as the ones from the FCDA Element
and also if the IED Name is the same. If that is the case this ExtRef subscribes to the selected FCDA
Element.

declarations.name: sharedStyles
declarations.default: css` section { background-color: var(--mdc-theme-surface); transition: all 200ms linear; outline-color: var(--mdc-theme-primary); outline-style: solid; outline-width: 0px; opacity: 1; } section:focus { box-shadow: 0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14), 0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12), 0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } h2 { color: var(--md-sys-color-on-surface); font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin: 0px; line-height: 48px; padding-left: 0.3em; transition: background-color 150ms linear; } filtered-list > oscd-list-item.selected { --md-sys-color-on-surface: var(--oscd-base3); --md-sys-color-on-surface-variant: var(--oscd-base2); background-color: var(--oscd-primary); transition: background-color 200ms linear; } h1 > nav, h1 > abbr > oscd-icon-button { float: right; } abbr[title] { border-bottom: none !important; cursor: inherit !important; text-decoration: none !important; } oscd-list-item.control > div[slot='headline'] { font-weight: 500; } `
declarations.description: Common `CSS` styles used by DataTypeTemplate subeditors

A sub element for showing all Ext Refs from a FCDA Element.
The List reacts on a custom event to know which FCDA Element was selected and updated the view.
declarations.name: ExtRefLnBindingList

declarations.description:
A sub element for showing all Goose/Sampled Value Controls.
A control can be edited using the oscd-scl-dialogs.
And when selecting a FCDA Element a custom event is fired, so other list can be updated.
declarations.name: FcdaBindingList
